title: Cobblemon: Egg Spawner
description: Adds spawn eggs for all generation Pokémon, with recipes.
body:
Cobblemon Egg Spawner – All Generations

1.

 

Add all 1025 Pokémon from Generations 1 to 9 as Spawn Eggs to your Cobblemon world!

Tired of relying only on natural spawns or breeding to get your favorite Pokémon from every region? Cobblemon Egg Spawner brings custom spawn eggs for every single Pokémon across all 9 generations (from Bulbasaur to Overqwil, including Hisuian forms, Paradox Pokémon, and DLC additions), letting you summon them directly in-game at level 10!


                   

Key Features

  • 1025 Unique Spawn Eggs: One for each Pokémon from Gen 1 to Gen 9.
  • Integrated Crafting Recipes: Use native Cobblemon items to craft the eggs in a balanced and thematic way.
  • Dedicated Creative Tabs: All eggs neatly organized by generation ("Gen 1 Spawn Eggs", "Gen 2 Spawn Eggs", etc.) for easy access.
  • Compatible with Fabric and NeoForge: Multi-loader support, works with the latest Minecraft + Cobblemon versions.

                                        

How do I customize the recipes in my modpack?


To remove or edit recipes, simply access the folders:
data/cobblemon_egg_spawner/recipe/gen1/
data/cobblemon_egg_spawner/recipe/gen2/
...up to Gen 9.

EGG TAGS FOR ADDON AND MODPACK CREATORS

Requirements:

  • Cobblemon (latest version recommended)
  • Fabric or NeoForge

Perfect for servers, modpacks, or singleplayer when you want full control over Pokémon acquisition from every generation without breaking progression.

Have fun building (or spawning!) your ultimate team from Kanto to Paldea! 🚀

If you find any bugs or have suggestions, feel free to report them. Future updates may include tweaks or extra support! 🌟
